articles.title: Solana DEX OptiFi Accidentally Shuts Itself Down, Locks Up $661,000
articles.description: Decentralized options exchange OptiFi, a project on the Solana blockchain, has come to an unexpected halt after its development team accidentally shut down the mainnet and locked up funds during an attempted upgrade. OptiFi developers made an expensive blunder yesterday.OptiFis development team stated from their official Twitter account that they had accidentally permanently closed the OptiFi...

articles.title: Crypto Lender Nexo allocates $50M to buyback its native token
articles.description: Crypto lending platform Nexo has allocated $50 million to buy back its native NEXO token as part of an ongoing initiative designed to bolster the stability and profitability of its ecosystem.

articles.title: Crypto community sets Dogecoin price for September 30, 2022
articles.description: Disclaimer: The CoinMarketCap cryptocurrency community price estimate is based only on the votes of its users. Estimates do not guarantee end-of-month... Continue reading

articles.title: Argentine Province of Mendoza to Accept Stablecoins for Tax Payments
articles.description: The fifth most populous province of Argentina will now accept cryptocurrencies, especially stablecoins, for tax payments, according to the Mendoza Tax Administration (ATM).

articles.title: AVAX Soars After Avalanche Founder Denies ‘Gangster Style’ Litigation Claims
articles.description: The price of Avalanche’s native token AVAX soared in the market today, after Emin Gün Sirer, Founder of Avalanche developer Ava Labs, called claims that he has used litigation to fool regulators and harm competitors “categorically false.”... Read More: AVAX Soars After Avalanche Founder Denies ‘Gangster Style’ Litigation Claims
